title: Semigroups for dynamical processes on metric graphs
abstract: We present the operator semigroups approach to first- and second-order dynamical systems taking place on metric graphs. We briefly survey the existing results and focus on the well-posedness of the problems with standard vertex conditions. Finally, we show two applications to biological models.
comment: To be published in Phil. Trans. R. Soc. A 378: 20190619
